allow: PowerShell(Get-Content lib\\docx.umd.js -TotalCount 2 | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $_.Length\)\) }; '---'; Get-Content lib\\exifr.umd.js -TotalCount 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $_.Length\)\) }; '---'; Get-Content lib\\jspdf.umd.min.js -TotalCount 3 | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $_.Length\)\) })

PowerShell($f = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PhotoLogBuild\\dist\\Psomas Photo Log.exe"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $item = Get-Item $f -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($item -and $item.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-2\)\) { break } }; if \($item\) { "built: $\($item.LastWriteTime\)" } else { "not found" })

PowerShell(if \($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\) { "env key present \(starts: $\($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.Substring\(0,12\)\)...\)" } else { "no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var" }; $ant = Get-Command ant -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ant\) { ant auth status } else { "ant CLI not installed" })

PowerShell($f = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PhotoLogBuild\\dist\\Psomas Photo Log.exe"; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(4\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $item = Get-Item $f -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($item -and $item.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-1\)\) { break } }; if \($item -and $item.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-2\)\) { "built $\($item.LastWriteTime\)" } else { "still building" })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Name 'Psomas Photo Log' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "app still running \($\($p.Count\) processes\)" } else { Copy-Item "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\PhotoLogBuild\\dist\\Psomas Photo Log.exe" dist\\ -Force; $out = Get-Item "dist\\Psomas Photo Log.exe"; "copied: $\($out.LastWriteTime\) \($\([math]::Round\($out.Length/1MB,1\)\) MB\)" })
